import importlib, sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
modules = [
    'config.settings',
    'utils.formatting',
    'utils.claude_client',
    'utils.github_client',
    'agents.story_reader',
    'agents.design_agent',
    'agents.implementation_agent',
    'agents.review_agent',
    'orchestrator',
]
for mod in modules:
    try:
        importlib.import_module\(mod\)
        print\(f'OK: {mod}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'ERROR: {mod} -> {e}'\)
")
